decisions.notes: Supersedes the erroneous codex_visual_canary_v1 approval. Human review identified an animation/illustration rendering style and a second tail-like appendage at the rump. The TRELLIS run started from this invalid reference was interrupted before inference/export. The later Pixal3D result is retained only as evidence that downstream image-to-3D inherits upstream ambiguity; it is not evidence of a Pixal3D backend failure.
